text.en: If your Army Faction is **ADEPTA SORORITAS**, each unit from your army with this ability can perform one Act of Faith per phase. This is done using Miracle dice.
Gaining Miracle Dice

If your Army Faction is **ADEPTA SORORITAS**, you gain 1 Miracle dice:

■ At the start of each battle round.
■ Each time an **ADEPTA SORORITAS** unit from your army is destroyed.

Each time you gain a Miracle dice, roll one D6. The number you roll is the value of that Miracle dice. This value cannot be changed or re‐rolled, unless a rule specifically states otherwise. Keep your Miracle dice to one side – this is your Miracle dice pool.
Performing an Act of Faith

Before making a dice roll for a model or unit from your army with the Acts of Faith ability, if you have one or more dice in your Miracle dice pool, that unit can perform an Act of Faith. If it does, select one of the dice from your Miracle dice pool to substitute that dice roll (if a roll involves more than one dice, e.g. a Charge roll or Battle-shock test, only a single dice can be substituted). The dice that is being substituted is not rolled; instead, the value of the selected Miracle dice is used as if it had been rolled (this counts as an unmodified dice roll of that value for all rules purposes). Each Miracle dice can only be selected for substitution once. Once all Miracle dice substitutions have been made, remove the chosen Miracle dice from your Miracle dice pool, and roll all remaining, unsubstituted dice that are apart of the dice roll. You can use Miracle dice when a unit performs an Act of Faith for any of the following types of dice roll:

■ Advance roll
■ Battle-shock test
■ Charge roll
■ Damage roll
■ Hit roll
■ Saving throw
■ Wound roll

***Example:** Instead of rolling 2D6 to take a Battle-shock test for a unit, you could use one dice from your Miracle dice pool. If the value of that dice was 4, the unit’s Battle-shock test would be determined by rolling one D6 and adding 4 to it (i.e. it would be D6+4).*

At the start of the battle round, you can select one of the following Vows of Atonement to be active for your army until the start of the next battle round. You can only select each Vow of Atonement once per battle.
The Path of the Penitent
Add 3" to the Move characteristic of **PENITENT** models from your army.
Absolution in Battle

Each time a unit from your army is selected to fight, if that unit made a Charge move this turn, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of melee weapons equipped by **PENITENT** models in that unit.
Death Before Disgrace

Each time a **PENITENT** model from your army is destroyed by a melee attack, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6. On a 2+, do not remove it from play; the destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

Each time an **ADEPTA SORORITAS** model from your army makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll if that model’s unit is below its Starting Strength, and add 1 to the Wound roll as well if that model’s unit is Below Half-strength.

Friendly Adepta Sororitas Infantry Fly units have the following ability: Condemnatory Psalms: In your Shooting phase, this unit can select one visible enemy unit within 12". That enemy unit is condemned:
  • While a unit is condemned, that unit has +3" detection range.
text.de:
Befreundete fliegende Adepta-Sororitas-Einheiten haben die folgende Fähigkeit: Psalme des Urteils: In deiner Fernkampfphase kann diese Einheit eine für sie sichtbare feindliche Einheit innerhalb von 12" wählen. Jene feindliche Einheit ist verurteilt:
  • Solange eine Einheit verurteilt ist, hat sie +3" Entdeckungsreichweite.
text.es:
Las unidades Infantería Volar Adepta Sororitas amigas tienen esta habilidad: Salmos sentenciadores: En tu fase de disparo, esta unidad puede elegir 1 unidad enemiga visible y a 12" o menos de ella. Esa unidad enemiga está sentenciada:
  • Mientras una unidad esté sentenciada, tiene +3" al alcance de detección.
text.fr:
Les unités d’Infanterie de l’Adepta Sororitas avec le mot-clé Vol amies ont l’aptitude suivante : Psaumes Condamnatoires : À votre phase de Tir, cette unité peut choisir une unité ennemie visible à 12" ou moins. L’unité ennemie est condamnée :
  • Tant qu’une unité est condamnée, elle a +3" en portée de détection.
text.it:
Le unità di Fanteria dell’Adepta Sororitas con Volare amiche hanno la seguente abilità: Salmi di Condanna: nella tua fase di Tiro questa unità può scegliere un’unità nemica visibile entro 12". Quell’unità nemica è condannata:
  • Fintanto che un’unità è condannata, ha +3" alla distanza di individuazione.
text.ja:
味方修道聖女会・インファントリー・飛行・ユニットは以下のアビリティを持つ： 糾弾の祈祷：自軍側射撃フェイズ中、このユニットの12mv以内に一部でも入っており、視認可能な敵ユニットを1個選択できる。選択された敵ユニットは糾弾状態になる：
  • ユニットが糾弾状態である間、そのユニットの発見範囲は+3mvの修正を受ける。
text.ko:
아군 아뎁타 소로리타스 보병 비행 유닛에 다음 능력을 부여합니다. 규탄의 찬가: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈에, 이 유닛의 12" 내에 있으며 시야에 들어온 적 유닛을 하나 지정할 수 있습니다. 그 적 유닛은 규탄받습니다.
  • 유닛이 규탄받은 동안에는, 그 유닛에 발각 범위 +3"를 적용합니다.
text.zh:
己方修女会步兵飞行单位拥有以下技能： 定罪圣咏：在己方射击阶段中，该单位可以选择一个位于其 12" 内的可见敌方单位。那个敌方单位被定罪：
  • 在一个单位被定罪时，那个单位的侦测范围增加 3"。

text.en:
• Enhancements selected from this detachment do not count towards the total number of enhancements in your army.
  • Friendly Adepta Sororitas Character units have +1 Ld.
text.de:
• Verbesserungen, die aus diesem Kontingent gewählt werden, zählen nicht gegen die Gesamtsumme der Verbesserungen deiner Armee.
  • Befreundete Adepta-Sororitas-Charaktermodell-Einheiten haben +1 MW.
text.es:
• Las mejoras elegidas de este destacamento no cuentan para el número total de mejoras de tu ejército.
  • Las unidades Personaje Adepta Sororitas amigas tienen +1 a L.
text.fr:
• Les optimisations choisies dans ce détachement ne comptent pas dans le nombre total d’optimisations de votre armée.
  • Les unités de Personnage de l’Adepta Sororitas amies ont +1 en Cd.
text.it:
• I potenziamenti scelti da questo distaccamento non contano ai fini del numero totale di potenziamenti nella tua armata.
  • Le unità Personaggio dell’Adepta Sororitas amiche hanno +1 D.
text.ja:
• このデタッチメント内から選択された強化は、アーミー内に編入できる強化の個数としてカウントされない。
  • 味方修道聖女会・キャラクター・ユニットは【統】に+1の修正を受ける。
text.ko:
• 이 디태치먼트에서 선택한 강화는 플레이어 군대에 적용된 강화의 총합에 포함되지 않습니다.
  • 아군 아뎁타 소로리타스 캐릭터 유닛에 통솔 +1을 적용합니다.
text.zh:
• 从本分遣队中选择的强化不会被算入您军队中可以拥有的强化数量总数。
  • 己方修女会角色单位拥有 +1 Ld。

text.en: Ranged weapons equipped by **ADEPTA SORORITAS** models from your army have the **[ASSAULT]** ability, and each time an attack made with such a weapon targets a unit within 6", add 1 to the Strength characteristic of that attack.

In your Command phase, you can select up to 3 **ADEPTA SORORITAS** units from your army (including units that are embarked within **TRANSPORTS**), until the start of your next Command phase, those units are Righteous. While a unit is Righteous:

■ Add 1" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit.
■ Improve the Leadership characteristic of models in that unit by 1.
■ Improve the Weapon Skill and Ballistic Skill characteristics of weapons equipped by **BATTLE SISTERS SQUAD**, **CELESTIAN SACRESANTS** and **PARAGON WARSUITS** models in that unit by 1.
Friendly Celestian Sacresants units’ attacks have +1 BS and WS. This detachment has the REVEREND tag and cannot be taken with another REVEREND detachment.
text.de: Die Attacken befreundeter Celestia-Sacresantis-Einheiten haben +1 BF und KG. Dieses Kontingent hat die Kennzeichnung Ehrwürden und kann nicht zusammen mit einem anderen Kontingent mit der Kennzeichnung Ehrwürden gewählt werden.
text.es: Los ataques de las unidades Celestes Sacrosantas amigas tienen +1 a HP y +1 a HA. Este destacamento tiene la etiqueta REVERENDO y no puede incluirse junto a otro destacamento REVERENDO.
text.fr: Les attaques des unités de Célestes Sacro-saintes amies ont +1 en CT et CC. Ce détachement a l’étiquette Révérend et ne peut pas être pris avec un autre détachement Révérend
text.it: Gli attacchi delle unità di Celestine Sacresant amiche hanno +1 AB e +1 AC. Questo distaccamento ha il descrittore Reverende e non può essere preso con un altro distaccamento Reverende.
text.ja: 味方セレスティアン・サクレサント・ユニットの攻撃の【射】と【接】は+1の修正を受ける。 このデタッチメントは崇敬者タグを持ち、他の崇敬者タグを持つデタッチメントと同時に編制できない。
text.ko: 아군 셀레스티안 성수호자 유닛의 공격에 사격과 근접 +1을 적용합니다. 이 디태치먼트에 성직자 태그가 부여되며 다른 성직자 디태치먼트와 함께 선택할 수 없습니다.
text.zh: 己方洁天使圣徒单位的攻击拥有 +1 BS 和 WS。 本分遣队拥有教士标签，并且不能与另一个拥有教士标签的分遣队被一同纳入军队中。

text.en: Each **ADEPTA SORORITAS** unit from your army can perform up to two Acts of Faith per phase, instead of just one.

target.en: One **PENITENT** unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.

when.en: Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a **PENITENT** model in your unit makes a melee attack, a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

fluff.en: The penitent are full of a burning passion to inflict suffering upon the faithless.

target.en: That **PENITENT** unit.

when.en: Your Movement phase, just before a **PENITENT** unit from your army Advances.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced. If your unit has the **PENITENT ENGINES** keyword, do not make an Advance roll for it; instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit.

fluff.en: Agony and guilt drive these sinners forward. Only by meeting the enemy in combat may they find repentance or, failing that, the comfort of death.

target.en: One **PENITENT** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, **PENITENT** models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

fluff.en: Suffering is the penance by which the faithful affirm their devotions. To share in the agonies suffered by the God-Emperor and his saints without embracing death is the mark of fidelity to the Imperial Creed.

target.en: One **ADEPTA SORORITAS** unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.

when.en: Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a melee attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll and, if your unit is Below Half-strength, you can re-roll the Wound roll as well.

fluff.en: With the Emperor’s light upon them, the righteous vengeance of the Sisters of Battle burns brighter.

target.en: One **ADEPTA SORORITAS** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

fluff.en: The Sisters of Battle gird themselves with the strength of their faith. It is a shield of repulsion that rejects the heretical cunning of their enemies.

target.en: One **ADEPTA SORORITAS** unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.

when.en: Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability. If one or more enemy models are destroyed as the result of attacks made by those weapons this phase, select one of those destroyed models; that destroyed model’s unit must take a Battle-shock test.

fluff.en: As the faithful strike their foes in righteous anger, they feel the Emperor’s hand adding strength to their blows.

target.en: One **ADEPTA SORORITAS** unit from your army that disembarked from a **TRANSPORT** this turn and has not been selected to shoot this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit within 6" that is also within range of an objective marker, add 1 to the Wound roll. If one or more enemy models are destroyed as the result of those attacks, select one of those destroyed models; that destroyed model’s unit must take a Battle-shock test.

fluff.en: At close range, the Adepta Sororitas unleash the full devastating potential of their blessed weapons.

target.en: That **ADEPTA SORORITAS** unit.

when.en: Any phase, just after a mortal wound is allocated to an **ADEPTA SORORITAS** unit from your army.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability against mortal wounds. If your unit is Righteous, until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against mortal wounds instead.

fluff.en: With so singular and fanatical a purpose, the Adepta Sororitas can will their injuries away, at least until the fight is done.

target.en: One **ADEPTA SORORITAS** unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.

when.en: Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, improve the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit by 1. If your unit is Righteous, until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit by 1 as well.

fluff.en: Seizing their moment to drive like a burning blade through the enemy lines and complete their holy mission, these faithful strike with unstoppable might.

target.en: One **ADEPTA SORORITAS** unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.

when.en: Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, each time a model in your unit makes a Pile‑in or Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3". When doing so, if your unit is Righteous, it does not need to end that move closer to the closest enemy model, provided it ends that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit.

fluff.en: When exemplars of the Imperial Creed stride to do the God‑Emperor’s will, little can slow their sacred procession.

target.en: One **CELESTIAN SACRESANTS** unit that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll. In addition, if your unit is Righteous, you can select one other **CELESTIAN SACRESANTS** unit from your army that is not Battle‑shocked and is within 6" of your unit. Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets that **CELESTIAN SACRESANTS** unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll as well.

fluff.en: Unified in their inviolate dedication to fulfil their oaths to Him on the Throne, the Order’s elite form a rampart of ceramite and unyielding faith to throw back the desperate blows of the foe.

target.en: That **ADEPTA SORORITAS** unit, or one friendly **ADEPTA SORORITAS JUMP PACK** unit within 3" of it.

when.en: Any phase, just after an **ADEPTA SORORITAS** unit from your army suffers a mortal wound.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against mortal wounds. If you targeted an **ADEPTA SORORITAS JUMP PACK** unit from your army with this Stratagem, then until the end of the phase, while a friendly **ADEPTA SORORITAS** unit is within 3" of your unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against mortal wounds.

fluff.en: There is no armour as resilient as conviction itself.

target.en: One **ADEPTA SORORITAS** unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.

when.en: Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the **[LANCE]** ability. If one or more enemy models are destroyed as the result of your unit’s attacks this phase, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

fluff.en: The righteous zeal of the Sisters of Battle burns bright as they charge towards their foes.

target.en: One **ADEPTA SORORITAS** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. If one or more enemy models are destroyed as the result of any of those attacks, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

fluff.en: With miraculous precision, the blows of the Sisters of Battle strike the weak points of enemy armour.

target.en: One **ADEPTA SORORITAS** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, Torrent weapons equipped by models in your unit have the **[DEVASTATING WOUNDS]** ability.

fluff.en: Burn the mutant. Burn the heretic. Burn the witch.

target.en: One **ADEPTA SORORITAS TRANSPORT** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.

effect.en: One unit embarked within your **TRANSPORT** can disembark as if it were your Movement phase, and can then shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but must target only that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.

fluff.en: The transports of the Adepta Sororitas are mobile shrines. The Sisters within this vehicle recite psalms of righteous hatred and destruction before emerging to obliterate their foes.

target.en: One **ADEPTA SORORITAS** unit from your army.

when.en: Command phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, your unit is blessed. While a unit is blessed, it can ignore any or all modifiers to the following: the profile characteristics of its models; the Weapon Skill or Ballistic Skill characteristics of weapons equipped by its models; any roll or test made for it (excluding modifiers to saving throws). If your unit has the **JUMP PACK** keyword, until the end of the turn, while a friendly **ADEPTA SORORITAS** unit is within 3" of your unit, that friendly unit is also blessed.

fluff.en: The Emperor’s radiance shines upon his warriors, magnifying their purity in their darkest hour.

target.en: One **PENITENT** unit from your army that was just destroyed while it was within range of an objective marker you controlled. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.

when.en: Any phase.

effect.en: That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

fluff.en: Those seeking absolution in the eyes of the Emperor will gladly give their last drop of blood to defy his enemies.

target.en: One **ADEPTA SORORITAS CHARACTER** unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.

when.en: Any phase.

effect.en: You can discard 1-3 Miracle dice. At the end of the phase, set up one **destroyed CHARACTER** model from your unit on the battlefield, **unengaged** and as close as possible to where it was **destroyed**. That model is not part of an **attached** unit and its unit has a **starting strength** of 1. Roll one D3, adding 1 to the result for each Miracle dice you discarded. That model has that number of wounds remaining (up to its starting number of wounds).

restrictions.en: You cannot select **SAINT CELESTINE** as the target of this Stratagem. You cannot select the same **CHARACTER** as the target of this Stratagem more than once per battle.

fluff.en: The pious believe that, in their moment of greatest need, the Emperor protects.

target.en: That **ADEPTA SORORITAS** unit.

when.en: Your Movement phase, just after an **ADEPTA SORORITAS** unit from your army Falls Back.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot or declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back. If your unit has the **PENITENT** keyword, it is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back instead.

fluff.en: The urge to absolve their sins and destroy the enemy drives the penitents to push their tortured bodies beyond their mortal limits.

target.en: One **PENITENT** unit from your army that was selected as the target as one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.

effect.en: Your unit can make a **surge move** of up to D6".

fluff.en: The God-Emperor’s faithful followers, heedless of incoming fire, leap forth to deliver his furious judgement in the press of melee.

target.en: One **ADEPTA SORORITAS INFANTRY** or **ADEPTA SORORITAS WALKER** unit from your army.

when.en: Start of the Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy model within Engagement Range of your unit selects its targets, it must select your unit as the target of its attacks.

fluff.en: Suffering is a staple for the Adepta Sororitas, and a martyr’s fate only brings glory to the God-Emperor.

target.en: One **ADEPTA SORORITAS VEHICLE** model from your army with the Deadly Demise ability that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.

when.en: Any phase.

effect.en: Do not roll one D6 to determine whether mortal wounds are inflicted by your model’s Deadly Demise ability. Instead, mortal wounds are automatically inflicted.

fluff.en: The enemy must perish, even if we perish with them. The enemy must burn, even if we burn with them.

target.en: One **ADEPTA SORORITAS** unit from your army that had one or more of its models destroyed as a result of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.

effect.en: Your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but it must target only that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.

fluff.en: The death of a Battle Sister only stirs the survivors to fight harder to exact swift vengeance.

target.en: That **ADEPTA SORORITAS TRANSPORT** model.

when.en: Your Movement phase, just before an **ADEPTA SORORITAS TRANSPORT** model from your army Advances.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, you can re-roll Advance rolls made for your **TRANSPORT**, and units can disembark from your **TRANSPORT** even though it Advanced. Units that do so count as having made a Normal move, and cannot declare a charge this turn.

fluff.en: Congregated within a transport, the Battle Sisters recite bellowing prayers so that the whole vehicle echoes to furious piety.

target.en: One **ADEPTA SORORITAS** unit from your army that is Righteous and that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.

effect.en: Select either the **[LETHAL HITS]** or **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability. Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have the selected ability.

fluff.en: No unclean foe can be permitted to stand between the Go‑Emperor’s sworn champions and their oathed duty. They must be struck down with unmerciful fury.

target.en: That **ADEPTA SORORITAS** unit.

when.en: Your Movement phase, just after an **ADEPTA SORORITAS** unit from your army Falls Back.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back. If your unit is Righteous, until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back instead.

fluff.en: Such champions of the God‑Emperor never stop fighting or striving for victory, transforming momentary retreats into another opportunity to purge the unclean and press on to their objective.

target.en: One **ADEPTA SORORITAS** **INFANTRY** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks, or one friendly **ADEPTA SORORITAS JUMP PACK** unit within 3" of such a unit.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll. If you targeted an **ADEPTA SORORITAS JUMP PACK** unit from your army with this Stratagem, then until the end of the phase, while a friendly **ADEPTA SORORITAS** **INFANTRY** unit is within 3" of your unit, each time an attack targets that unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

fluff.en: The Emperor’s divinity manifests in golden halos, blinding the enemy with radiant light.

target.en: One **ADEPTA SORORITAS JUMP PACK** unit from your army.

when.en: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.

effect.en: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place to into Strategic Reserves.

restrictions.en: You cannot select a unit that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

fluff.en: On wings of fire do the angelic warriors of the Orders Militant descent to battle.

target.en: One **ADEPTA SORORITAS** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

fluff.en: Even with their dying act, the Adepta Sororitas mete out the Emperor’s judgement.

target.en: One friendly <k>ADEPTA SORORITAS INFANTRY FLY</k> unit.
target.fr: 1 unité d'<k>Infanterie</k> de l'<k>Adepta Sororitas</k> ayant le mot-clé <k>Vol</k> amie.
target.it: Un'unità di  <k>FANTERIA</k> con <k>VOLARE</k> dell'<k>ADEPTA SORORITAS</k> amica.
target.ja: 味方<k>修道聖女会・インファントリー・飛行</k>・ユニット1個。
target.ko: 아군 <k>아뎁타 소로리타스 보병 비행</k> 유닛 하나.
target.zh: 一个己方<k>修女会步兵飞行</k>单位。

when.en: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly <k>Exorcist</k> unit has shot.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase, nachdem eine befreundete <k>Exorzist</k>-Einheit geschossen hat
when.es: En tu fase de disparo, cuando una unidad <k>Exorcista</k> amiga haya disparado.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir, quand une unité d’<k>Exorcist</k> amie a tiré.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro, dopo che un’unità <k>Exorcist</k> amica ha tirato.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、味方<k>エクソシスト</k>・ユニットが射撃を行った時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈, 아군 <k>퇴마전차</k> 유닛이 사격 수행을 종료했을 때.
when.zh: 己方射击阶段中，在一个己方<k>驱魔者战车</k>单位完成射击后。

effect.en: Select one enemy unit (excluding <k>Monster/Vehicle</k> units) hit by those ranged attacks. Your unit’s ranged attacks that target that unit have <k>[Devastating Wounds]</k>.
effect.de: Wähle eine feindliche Einheit (ausgenommen <k>Monster-/Fahrzeug</k>-Einheiten), die von mindestens einer jener Fernkampfattacken getroffen wurde. Attacken deiner Einheit gegen jene Einheit haben <k>[Verheerende Verwundungen]</k>.
effect.es: Elige 1 unidad enemiga (salvo <k>Monstruo/Vehículo</k>) en la que haya impactado alguno de esos ataques a distancia. Los ataques a distancia de tu unidad que tomen como blanco a esa unidad tienen <k>[Heridas devastadoras]</k>.
effect.fr: Choisissez 1 unité ennemie (hormis les unités de <k>Monstre/Véhiucle</k>) touchée par ces attaques de tir. Les attaques de tir de votre unité qui ciblent l'unité ennemie choisie ont <k>[Blessures Dévastatrices]</k>.
effect.it: Scegli un'unità nemica (escluse le unità <k>Mostro/Veicolo</k>) colpita da quegli attacchi da tiro. Gli attacchi da tiro che hanno come bersaglio quell'unità hanno <k>[Ferite Devastanti]</k>.
effect.ja: それらの射撃攻撃がヒットした敵ユニット（<k>モンスター/ビークル</k>・ユニットを除く）を1個選択する。そのユニットを対象とした、その自軍ユニットの射撃攻撃は<k>［会心ウーンズ］</k>を持つ。
effect.ko: 그 원거리 공격이 명중한 적 유닛(<k>괴수/기체</k> 유닛 제외)을 하나 지정합니다. 그 유닛을 대상으로 지정하는 이 유닛의 원거리 공격에 <k>[궤멸적 피해]</k>가 부여됩니다.
effect.zh: 选择一个被那些远程攻击命中的敌方单位（<k>凶兽/载具</k>单位除外）。该己方单位对那个敌方单位进行的远程攻击拥有<k>[毁灭伤害]</k>。

fluff.en: With shock waves, shrapnel and deafening hymnals shattering their cohesion, survivors of an Exorcist strike are unready to face fresh skyborne assaults.
fluff.de: Nachdem Schockwellen, Schrapnell und ohrenbetäubende Hymnen ihren Zusammenhalt zerstört haben, können die Überlebenden eines Exorzistenschlags kaum auch noch dem Angriff der heranspringenden Schwestern widerstehen.
fluff.es: Con ondas de choque, metralla y ensordecedores himnos que anulan su cohesión, los supervivientes del ataque de un Exorcista no están preparados para afrontar nuevos asaltos celestiales.
fluff.fr: Leur cohésion brisée par des ondes de choc, du shrapnel et des hymnes assourdissants, les survivants d’une frappe d’Exorcist sont vulnérables à un assaut aéroporté.
fluff.it: Investiti da onde d’urto, schegge e inni assordanti che compromettono la coesione, i superstiti dell’attacco di un Exorcist non riescono a reagire ai successivi assalti aerei.
fluff.ja: 衝撃波、破片、そして耳を裂くような讃美歌が敵の隊形を粉砕する。エクソシストの攻撃を生き延びた者たちは、空からの新たな襲撃に対峙する準備を整えることができない。
fluff.ko: 충격파, 파편, 귀가 멀듯한 성가로 이루어진 퇴마전차의 공격에서 살아남긴 했으나 결속이 깨어진 적은 다음 공습에 무방비하게 노출되어 있다.
fluff.zh: 在震荡波、破片和赞歌的冲击下，被驱魔者战车攻击的幸存者们无法迎击从天而降的突袭。

target.en: That <k>Exorcist</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>エクソシスト</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Exorcist unit is selected to shoot.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete Exorzist-­Einheit zum Schießen gewählt wird
when.es: En tu fase de disparo, cuando una unidad Exorcista amiga se elige para disparar.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir, quand une unité d’Exorcist amie est choisie pour tirer.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro, quando un’unità Exorcist amica viene scelta per tirare.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、味方エクソシスト・ユニットが射撃を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈에, 아군 퇴마전차 유닛이 사격 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在您的射击阶段中，当一个己方驱魔者战车单位被选择进行射击时。

effect.en: Select one unit visible to and within 9" of a friendly Adepta Sororitas Infantry Fly unit. Your unit’s ranged attacks that target that unit have +1 to hit rolls.
effect.de: Wähle eine für eine befreundete fliegende Adepta-Sororitas-Infanterie-Einheit sichtbare feindliche Einheit innerhalb von 9". Fernkampfattacken deiner Einheit gegen jene Einheit haben +1 auf Treffer­würfe.
effect.es: Elige 1 unidad visible para alguna unidad Infantería Volar Adepta Sororitas amiga y a 9" o menos de ella. Los ataques a distancia de tu unidad que tomen como blanco esa unidad tienen +1 a las tiradas para impactar.
effect.fr: Choisissez une unité visible et à 9" ou moins d’une unité Infanterie de l’Adepta Sororitas amie avec le mot-clé Vol. Les attaques de tir de votre unité qui ciblent l’unité choisie ont +1 aux jets de touche.
effect.it: Scegli un’unità visibile a un’unità di Fanteria dell’Adepta Sororitas con Volare amica ed entro 9" da essa. Gli attacchi da tiro della tua unità che hanno come bersaglio quell’unità hanno +1 ai tiri per colpire.
effect.ja: 味方修道聖女会・インファントリー・飛行・ユニットの9mv以内に一部でも入っており、視認可能なユニットを1個選択する。自軍ユニットは、選択されたユニットを攻撃対象とする攻撃のヒットロールに+1の修正を受ける。
effect.ko: 아군 아뎁타 소로리타스 보병 비행 유닛의 9" 내에 있으며 시야에 들어온 유닛을 하나 지정합니다. 그 유닛을 대상으로 지정하는 이 유닛의 원거리 공격에 명중 굴림 +1을 적용합니다.
effect.zh: 选择位于一个己方修女会步兵飞行单位 9" 内且对其可见的一个敌方单位。在您的单位对被选择的单位进行远程攻击时，命中掷骰 +1。

fluff.en: In harmony with the targeting hymnals of angelic warriors, an Exorcist’s devastating rockets seem drawn to the heresy of the foe.
fluff.de: Die zerstörerischen Raketen eines Exorzisten scheinen in Harmonie mit den Hymnen der Zielgenauigkeit engelsgleicher Kriegerinnen auf den häretischen Feind niederzugehen.
fluff.es: En armonía con los himnos de las guerreras angelicales, los devastadores cohetes de un Exorcista parecen atraídos por la herejía del enemigo.
fluff.fr: En harmonie avec les hymnes de ciblage de guerrières angéliques, les roquettes d’un Exorcist semblent attirées par l’hérésie de l’ennemi.
fluff.it: In armonia con gli inni di puntamento dei guerrieri angelici, i devastanti razzi di un Exorcist paiono seguire l’eresia annidata nel nemico.
fluff.ja: 天使を思わせる戦士たちは標的を定める聖歌を唱和する。その声に調和したエクソシストの強烈なロケット弾は、異端者たる敵に引き寄せられるかのように着弾する。
fluff.ko: 퇴마전차의 로켓이 적 이단을 추적하듯 날아가며 천사와 같은 전사들의 조준 송가에 화음을 더한다.
fluff.zh: 在与天降战士们的瞄准圣歌进行同步后，驱魔者战车的致命飞弹就能够追踪敌人的异端。

target.en: One friendly <k>Adepta Sororitas Infantry Fly</k> unit or one friendly <k>Exorcist</k> unit.
target.de: Eine befreundete <k>fliegende Adepta-Sororitas-Infanterie</k>-­Einheit oder eine befreundete <k>Exorzist</k>-Einheit
target.es: 1 unidad <k>Infantería Volar Adepta Sororitas</k> amiga o 1 unidad <k>Exorcista</k> amiga.
target.fr: Une unité d’<k>Infanterie</k> de l’<k>Adepta Sororitas</k> avec le mot-clé <k>Vol</k> ou une unité d’<k>Exorcist</k> amie.
target.it: Un’unità di <k>Fanteria</k> dell’<k>Adepta Sororitas</k> con <k>Volare</k> amica o un’unità <k>Exorcist</k> amica.
target.ja: 味方<k>修道聖女会・インファントリー・飛行</k>・ユニットあるいは味方<k>エクソシスト</k>・ユニット1個。
target.ko: 아군 <k>아뎁타 소로리타스 보병 비행</k> 유닛 하나 또는 아군 <k>퇴마전차</k> 유닛 하나.
target.zh: 一个己方<k>修女会步兵飞行</k>单位，或者一个己方<k>驱魔者战车</k>单位。

when.en: Start of the Command phase.
when.es: Al inicio de la fase de mando.
when.fr: Au début de la phase de Commandement.

effect.en: Select one friendly battle‑shocked Adepta Sororitas unit within 6" of your unit. That unit is no longer battle‑shocked.
effect.de: Wähle eine erschütterte befreundete Adepta-Sororitas-­Einheit innerhalb von 6" um deine Einheit. Jene Einheit ist nicht länger erschüttert.
effect.es: Elige 1 unidad Adepta Sororitas amiga acobardada a 6" o menos de tu unidad. Esa unidad deja de estar acobardada.
effect.fr: Choisissez 1 unité de l’Adepta Sororitas amie ébranlée et à 6" ou moins de votre unité. L’unité choisie n’est plus ébranlée.
effect.it: Scegli un’unità dell’Adepta Sororitas amica traumatizzata entro 6" dalla tua unità. Quell’unità non è più traumatizzata.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットの6mv以内に一部でも入っており、戦闘ショック状態である味方修道聖女会・ユニット1個を選択する。選択されたユニットは戦闘ショック状態ではなくなる。
effect.ko: 이 유닛의 6" 내에 있으며 전투충격 상태인 아군 아뎁타 소로리타스 유닛을 하나 지정합니다. 그 유닛이 전투충격 상태에서 벗어납니다.
effect.zh: 选择一个位于您的单位 6" 内且处于战斗震慑状态的己方修女会单位。那个单位不再处于战斗震慑状态。

fluff.en: Roared blessings and deafening reminders of sacred duty fan afresh the fires of conviction which blaze through the souls of the God‑Emperor’s faithful.
fluff.de: Gebrüllte Segnungen und ohrenbetäubende Erinnerungen an die heilige Pflicht fachen die Feuer der Überzeugung neu an, die in den Seelen der Gläubigen des Gottimperators brennen.
fluff.es: Las bendiciones rugientes y los ensordecedores recordatorios del deber sagrado avivan el fuego de la convicción que arde en las almas de los fieles del Dios Emperador.
fluff.fr: Rugir des bénédictions et des rappels assourdissants du devoir sacré ravive le feu de la conviction qui anime l’âme des fidèles de l’Empereur-Dieu.
fluff.it: Le fragorose benedizioni e gli assordanti richiami ai sacri doveri riaccendono le fiamme della determinazione nell’animo delle devote al Dio-Imperatore.
fluff.ja: 祝福されし轟音で、神聖なる責務を思い起こさせる雄叫びは、神帝陛下の忠実なる僕たちの魂を満たす信念の炎をかき立てる。
fluff.ko: 울려퍼지는 축성과 귀가 멀 듯한 거룩한 의무의 독촉이 신-황제를 믿는 이들의 영혼을 부채질하여 신념의 불길로 감싼다.
fluff.zh: 呐喊祝福和神圣使命的警示能够再次煽动信念的火焰，激起神皇信徒们的斗志。

target.en: That <k>Celestian Sacresants</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>セレスティアン・サクレサント</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Fight phase, when a friendly Celestian Sacresants unit is selected to fight.
when.de: Nahkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete <k>Celestia-Sacresantis</k>-Einheit zum Kämpfen gewählt wird
when.es: En la fase de combate, cuando una unidad Celestes Sacrosantas amiga se elige para combatir.
when.fr: À la phase de Combat, quand une unité de Célestes Sacro-saintes amie est choisie pour combattre.
when.it: Nella fase di Combattimento, quando un’unità di Celestine Sacresant amica viene scelta per combattere.
when.ja: 白兵フェイズ中、味方<k>セレスティアン・サクレサント</k>・ユニットが白兵を宣言した時。
when.ko: 백병전 페이즈, 아군 셀레스티안 성수호자 유닛이 백병전 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在近战阶段中，当一个己方洁天使圣徒单位被选择进行近战时。

effect.en: Your unit’s melee attacks have +1 A and S.
effect.de: Die Nahkampfattacken deiner Einheit haben +1 A und S.
effect.es: Los ataques de combate de tu unidad tienen +1 a A y +1 a F.
effect.fr: Les attaques de mêlée de votre unité ont +1 en A et en F.
effect.it: Gli attacchi da mischia della tua unità hanno +1 A e +1 Fo.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットの白兵攻撃の【数】と【攻】は+1の修正を受ける。
effect.ko: 이 유닛의 백병전 공격에 공격 및 위력 +1을 적용합니다.
effect.zh: 您的单位的近战攻击拥有 +1 A 和 S。

fluff.en: To stand against the dutiful zealots of the Adepta Sororitas is to be condemned and destroyed by the power of their righteous fury.
fluff.de: Der Kampf gegen die pflichtversessenen Zelotinnen des Adepta Sororitas kann nur in einem schrecklichen Urteilsspruch und der Vernichtung durch ihren rechtschaffenen Zorn enden.
fluff.es: Enfrentarse a las fieles fanáticas de las Adepta Sororitas es ser condenado y destruido por el poder de su furia justiciera.
fluff.fr: Se dresser face aux fanatiques de l'Adepta Sororitas est une condamnation à la destruction par la puissance de leur juste fureur.
fluff.it: Affrontare le ferventi zelote dell’Adepta Sororitas vuol dire essere annientati dalla potenza della loro giusta furia.
fluff.ja: 修道聖女会の献身的狂信者に刃向かうことは、彼女らの憤怒により断罪され、破滅をもたらされるに等しい。
fluff.ko: 아뎁타 소로리타스의 충실한 광신도들에 맞선다는 것은 그 의로운 분노의 힘 앞에 규탄받고 파괴되는 것을 의미한다.
fluff.zh: 胆敢与修女会的虔诚狂热者为敌，便注定将被其正义之怒的威能所审判与毁灭。

target.en: That <k>Celestian Sacresants</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>セレスティアン・サクレサント</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your Movement phase, when a friendly Celestian Sacresants unit is selected to make an advance/fall-back move.
when.de: Deine Bewegungsphase, wenn eine befreundete Celestia-­Sacresantis-Einheit gewählt wird, eine Vorrücken/-Rückzugs­bewegung auszuführen
when.es: En tu fase de movimiento, cuando una unidad Celestes Sacrosantas amiga hace un movimiento de avanzar/de retroceder.
when.fr: À votre phase de Mouvement, quand une unité de Célestes Sacro-saintes amie est choisie pour faire un mouvement d’avance/de retraite.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Movimento, quando un’unità di Celestine Sacresant amica viene scelta per effettuare un movimento di avanzata/ripiegamento.
when.ja: 自軍側移動フェイズ中、味方セレスティアン・サクレサント・ユニットが全力移動/退却移動を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 이동 페이즈, 아군 셀레스티안 성수호자 유닛이 급속/후퇴 이동 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在您的移动阶段中，当一个己方洁天使圣徒单位被选择进行一次突进/后撤移动时。

effect.en:
• Your unit’s ranged attacks have [ASSAULT] until the end of the turn.
  • That move does not prevent your unit from being eligible to shoot/declare a charge.
effect.de:
• Die Fernkampfattacken deiner Einheit haben bis zum Ende des Zugs [Sturm].
  • Jene Bewegung verhindert nicht, dass deine Einheit infrage kommt, zu schießen/einen Angriff anzusagen.
effect.es:
• Los ataques a distancia de tu unidad tienen [Asalto] hasta el final del turno.
  • Ese movimiento no impide que tu unidad sea apta para disparar/para declarar cargas.
effect.fr:
• Les attaques de tir de votre unité ont [ASSAUT] jusqu'à la fin du tour.
  • Ce mouvement n'empêche pas votre unité d’être éligible pour tirer/déclarer une charge.
effect.it:
• Gli attacchi da tiro della tua unità hanno [Assalto] fino alla fine del turno.
  • Quel movimento non impedisce alla tua unità di essere idonea a tirare/dichiarare una carica.
effect.ja:
• そのターン終了時まで、その自軍ユニットの射撃攻撃は［アサルト］を持つ。
  • その移動を行った場合でも、そのユニットは射撃/突撃を宣言可能である。
effect.ko:
• 턴이 종료될 때까지 이 유닛의 원거리 공격에 [기동 사격]을 부여합니다.
  • 그 이동에도 불구하고 이 유닛은 사격 수행/돌격 선언이 가능합니다.
effect.zh:
• 在回合结束前，您的单位的远程攻击拥有[突击]。
  • 那次移动不会阻止您的单位进行射击/宣布冲锋。

fluff.en: These veteran warriors endure gruelling regimens to prepare them – physically and spiritually – to outlast, outmanoeuvre and outfight the foe at every turn.
fluff.de: Diese Veteraninnen haben zermürbende Behandlungen über sich ergehen lassen, um mit Leib und Seele darauf vorbereitet zu sein, den Feind immer wieder zu überdauern, auszumanövrieren und zu übertrumpfen.
fluff.es: Estas veteranas guerreras soportan regímenes extenuantes que las preparan, física y espiritualmente, para sobrevivir, maniobrar mejor y luchar con más fuerza que el enemigo en todo momento.
fluff.fr: Ces guerrières endurcies suivent une discipline stricte, physique et spirituelle, afin de déjouer et surclasser l'ennemi.
fluff.it: Questi guerrieri veterani si sottopongono ad addestramenti estenuanti, sia a livello fisico che spirituale, in modo da superare i nemici sotto ogni aspetto.
fluff.ja: 老練の戦士たちは過酷な訓練を耐え抜き、心身を徹底的に鍛錬することで、あらゆる局面において敵を凌駕し、出し抜き、打ち倒す備えを整えている。
fluff.ko: 이 베테랑 전사들은 적보다 더 오래 버티고, 더 빠르게 이동하며, 더 압도적으로 교전하기 위해 신체적으로나 영적으로나 혹독한 훈련과 생활 규제를 견뎌낸다.
fluff.zh: 这些老兵经受了严酷的训练，无论是肉体还是精神都准备万全，在每时每刻都能超越敌人。

target.en: That <k>Celestian Sacresants</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>セレスティアン・サクレサント</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Any phase, when a friendly Celestian Sacresants unit suffers a mortal wound.
when.de: Beliebige Phase, wenn eine Celestia-Sacresantis-Einheit eine tödliche Verwundung erleidet
when.es: En cualquier fase cuando una unidad Celestes Sacrosantas amiga sufre una herida mortal.
when.fr: À n’importe quelle phase, quand une unité de Célestes Sacro-saintes amie subit une blessure mortelle.
when.it: In qualsiasi fase, quando un’unità di Celestine Sacresant amica subisce una o più ferite mortali.
when.ja: いずれかのフェイズ中、味方セレスティアン・サクレサント・ユニットが致命的ダメージを受けた時。
when.ko: 어느 페이즈든, 아군 셀레스티안 성수호자 유닛이 치명상을 입을 때.
when.zh: 任意阶段中，在一个己方洁天使圣徒单位受到一处致命伤时。

effect.en: Your unit has Feel No Pain 5+ against mortal wounds until the end of the phase.
effect.de: Deine Einheit hat bis zum Ende der Phase Verletzungen ignorieren 5+ gegen tödliche Verwundungen.
effect.es: Tu unidad tiene No hay dolor 5+ contra heridas mortales hasta el final de la fase.
effect.fr: Votre unité a Insensible à la Douleur 5+ contre les blessures mortelles jusqu’à la fin de la phase.
effect.it: La tua unità ha Insensibile al Dolore 5+ contro le ferite mortali fino alla fine della fase.
effect.ja: そのフェイズ終了時まで、その自軍ユニットは致命的ダメージに対する『痛みを知らぬ者5+』を持つ。
effect.ko: 페이즈가 종료될 때까지 이 유닛에 치명상에만 적용되는 불굴 5+를 부여합니다.
effect.zh: 直到阶段结束前，您的单位针对致命伤拥有不觉疼痛 5+。

fluff.en: Drawing upon their deep wells of piety, Sacresant elite can fight on even through overwhelming or eldritch assaults.
fluff.de: Die elitären Sacresantis-Schwestern schöpfen tief aus ihrem Quell demütigen Glaubens und überstehen selbst vernichtende magische Angriffe.
fluff.es: Inspiradas por su profunda fe y piedad, la élite Sacresanta sigue luchando incluso durante asaltos abrumadores o sobrenaturales.
fluff.fr: En puisant dans leur piété, les guerrières de l'élite sacro-sainte peuvent surmonter les assauts ésotériques.
fluff.it: Attingendo a piene mani alla propria devozione, l’élite delle Sacresant continua a combattere malgrado gli innumerevoli attacchi arcani.
fluff.ja: 篤き信仰を糧とする神聖大天使の精鋭は、凄烈な攻撃や異界の力の猛襲に晒されようとも、なお踏みとどまって戦い続ける。
fluff.ko: 깊고 독실한 신앙이 힘의 원천인 성수호자의 정예는 압도적이고 섬뜩한 적의 공격에도 꿋꿋이 맞서 싸운다.
fluff.zh: 通过自身内心的信仰，圣徒们就算遭到非自然的攻击也能够坚持战斗。

name.ja: 響和弾（アップグレード）

description.en: Exorcist unit only. This unit can re‑roll rolls to determine the A of a weapon.
description.de: Nur für eine Exorzist-Einheit. Diese Einheit kann Würfe zum Bestimmen der A einer Waffe wiederholen.
description.es: Solo unidad Exorcista. Esta unidad puede repetir las tiradas para determinar los A de un arma.
description.fr: Unité d’Exorcist seulement. Cette unité peut relancer les jets pour déterminer les A d’une arme.
description.it: Solo unità di Exorcist. Questa unità può ripetere i tiri per determinare la caratteristica A di un’arma.
description.ja: エクソシスト・ユニットのみ。このユニットは武器の【数】を決定する際のダイスロールをリロールできる。
description.ko: 퇴마전차 모델 전용. 이 유닛은 무기의 공격을 정하는 주사위 굴림을 재굴림할 수 있습니다.
description.zh: 仅限驱魔者战车单位。该单位在掷骰决定武器的 A 属性时可以进行重掷。

description.fr: Figurine de l’Adepta Sororitas seulement. Cette unité a +1" en M.
description.it: Solo modelli dell’Adepta Sororitas. Questa unità ha +1" M.

description.en: Canoness with Jump Pack model only. At the end of your opponent’s Fight phase, if this unit is unengaged, you can place this unit in strategic reserves.
description.de: Nur für ein Principalis-mit-Sprungmodul-Modell. Wenn diese Einheit am Ende der Nahkampfphase deines Gegners nicht im Nahkampf ist, kannst du diese Einheit in strategische Reserve versetzen.
description.es: Solo miniatura Canonesa con propulsor de salto. Al final de la fase de combate del oponente, si esta unidad se considera no trabada, puedes colocarla en la reserva estratégica.
description.fr: Figurine de Chanoinesse à Réacteur Dorsal seulement. À la fin de la phase de Combat adverse, si cette unité est non engagée, vous pouvez la placer en réserve stratégique.
description.it: Solo modelli di Badessa con Reattori Dorsali. Alla fine della fase di Combattimento dell’avversario, se questa unità è non ingaggiata, puoi collocarla nelle riserve strategiche.
description.ja: カノネス（ジャンプパック装備）・兵のみ。敵軍側白兵フェイズ終了時、このユニット内が非接敵状態である場合、このユニットを戦略的予備兵力に配置できる。
description.ko: 수도원장·점프팩 모델 전용. 상대의 백병전 페이즈 종료 시, 이 유닛이 교전 상태가 아니라면 이 유닛을 전략 예비대에 넣을 수 있습니다.
description.zh: 仅限跳跃背包大修女模型。在您对手的近战阶段结束时，如果该单位不处于交战状态，您可以将该单位放入战略预备队。

description.de: Nur für eine Celestia-Sacresantis-Einheit. Diese Einheit hat +1 MK.
description.es: Solo unidad Celestes Sacrosantas. Esta unidad tiene +1 a CO.

description.zh: 仅限洁天使圣徒单位。该单位拥有 +1 OC。

name.ja: 聖業唱導官（アップグレード）

description.en:
Adepta Sororitas Character model only (excluding Penitent units). (Once per turn, per unit) At the start of a phase, you can use this ability. If you do, select one of the abilities below:
  • Rite of Revelation: While this unit is shooting, enemy units have +6" detection range.
  • Sermon of Intolerance: This unit’s battle‑shock rolls automatically succeed.
  • Catechism of Raging Fervour: This unit has +1" M.
  • Psalm of Righteous Smiting: This unit’s attacks have +1 S.
  • Chorus of Repudiation: Attacks that target this unit with a S greater than this unit’s T have ‑1 to wound rolls.
description.de:
Nur für ein ADEPTA-SORORITAS-CHARAKTERMODELL (ausgenommen BÜSSER-Einheiten). (Einmal pro Zug, pro Einheit) Zu Beginn einer Befehlsphase kannst du diese Fähigkeit einsetzen. Wenn du dies tust, wähle eine der folgenden Fähigkeiten:
  • Ritus der Offenbarung: Solange diese Einheit schießt, haben feindliche Einheiten +6" Entdeckungsreichweite.
  • Predigt der Intoleranz: Erschütterungswürfe für diese Einheit sind automatisch erfolgreich.
  • Katechismus des religiösen Eifers: Diese Einheit hat bis +1" B.
  • Psalm der rechtschaffenen Niederwerfung: Attacken dieser Einheit haben +1 S.
  • Choral der Zurückweisung: Attacken gegen diese Einheit, deren S höher ist als der W dieser Einheit, haben ‑1 auf Verwundungswürfe.
description.es:
Solo miniatura PERSONAJE ADEPTA SORORITAS (excepto unidades PENITENTE). (Una vez por turno, por unidad) Al inicio de una fase, puedes usar esta habilidad. Si lo haces, elige una de las siguientes habilidades:
  • Rito de la Revelación: Mientras esta unidad dispare, las unidades enemigas tienen +6" al alcance de detección.
  • Sermón de la Intolerancia: Esta unidad supera automáticamente todas sus tiradas de acobardamiento.
  • Catecismo del Fervor embravecido: Esta unidad tiene +1" a M.
  • Salmo del Justo castigo: Los ataques de esta unidad tienen +1 a F.
  • Coro del Repudio: Los ataques que tomen como blanco esta unidad con una F mayor que la R de esta unidad tienen -1 a las tiradas para herir.
description.fr:
Figurine de PERSONNAGE de l'ADEPTA SORORITAS seulement (unités de PÉNITENTS exclues). (Une fois par tour, par unité) À votre phase de Commandement, vous pouvez utiliser une des aptitudes suivantes.
  • Rite de Révélation : Pendant que cette unité est en train de tirer, les unités ennemies ont +6" en portée de détection
  • Sermon d’Intolérance : Les jets d’ébranlement de cette unité réussissent automatiquement.
  • Catéchisme de Ferveur Rageuse : Cette unité a +1" en M.
  • Psaume de Juste Châtiment : Les attaques de cette unité ont +1 en F.
  • Chœur de Répudiation : Les attaques qui ciblent cette unité avec une F supérieure à son E ont ‑1 aux jets de blessure.
description.it:
Solo modelli di PERSONAGGIO dell'ADEPTA SORORITAS (escluse le unità di PENITENTI). (Una volta per turno, per unità) All’inizio di una fase puoi usare questa abilità. Se lo fai scegli una delle abilità in basso:
  • Rito della Rivelazione: fintanto che questa unità tira, le unità nemiche hanno +6" alla distanza di individuazione.
  • Sermone dell’Intolleranza: i tiri per i traumi di questa unità hanno automaticamente successo.
  • Catechismo del Fervore Furibondo: questa unità ha +1" M.
  • Salmo della Giusta Punizione: gli attacchi di questa unità hanno +1 Fo.
  • Coro della Sconfessione: gli attacchi che hanno come bersaglio questa unità e che hanno una Fo maggiore della R di questa unità hanno ‑1 ai tiri per ferire.
description.ja:
修道聖女会・キャラクター・兵のみ（悔悟者・ユニットを除く）。（ユニットごとに、各ターンにつき1回）フェイズ開始時、自軍はこのアビリティを使用できる。使用した場合、以下のアビリティの中から1つを選択する：
  • 啓示の儀：このユニットが射撃を行っている間、敵ユニットの発見範囲は+6mvの修正を受ける。
  • 不寛容の説教：このユニットの戦闘ショックロールは自動的に成功する。
  • 狂熱の教理：このユニットの【移】は+1mvの修正を受ける。
  • 正義の猛攻の詩篇：このユニットの【攻】は+1の修正を受ける。
  • 排斥の唱和：このユニットを対象とした攻撃の【攻】が、このユニットの【耐】を上回っている場合、その攻撃のウーンズロールは-1の修正を受ける。
description.ko:
아뎁타 소로리타스 캐릭터 모델 전용(속죄자 유닛 제외). (유닛마다 턴 당 한번) 어느 페이즈든 시작 시, 이 능력을 사용할 수 있습니다. 그렇게 할 경우, 다음 능력 중 하나를 선택합니다.
  • 계시의 의례: 이 유닛이 사격을 수행하는 동안, 적 유닛에 발각 범위 +6"를 적용합니다.
  • 불관용의 설교: 이 유닛의 전투충격 굴림이 자동으로 통과합니다.
  • 타오르는 열정의 교리문답: 이 유닛에 이동 +1"를 적용합니다.
  • 의로운 강타의 송가: 이 유닛의 공격에 위력 +1을 적용합니다.
  • 거부의 합창: 이 유닛을 대상으로 지정하는 공격의 위력이 이 유닛의 내구보다 높을 경우, 그 공격에 타격 굴림 -1을 적용합니다.
description.zh:
仅限修女会角色模型（忏悔者单位除外）。（每个单位，每个回合限一次）在阶段开始时，您可以使用该技能，若使用，选择以下一个技能。
  • 显现仪式：在该单位进行射击时，直到回合结束前，敌方单位的侦测范围 +6"。
  • 偏狭教导：直到阶段结束前，该单位的战斗震慑掷骰自动成功。
  • 狂热教义：直到回合结束前，该单位拥有 +1" M。
  • 正义惩戒赞歌：直到回合结束前，该单位的攻击拥有 +1 S。
  • 批判合唱：直到下一个己方回合开始前，如果针对该单位的攻击的 S 大于该单位的 T，那么攻击的致伤掷骰 -1。

description.en: **ADEPTA SORORITAS** model only. When the bearer is destroyed, you gain an additional D3 Miracle dice.

**ADEPTA SORORITAS** model only. Add 1 to the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons. If the bearer has lost one or more wounds, add 2 to the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons instead.

**ADEPTA SORORITAS** model only. At the end of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you can re-roll 1 Miracle dice from your Miracle dice pool and return it to your Miracle dice pool showing the new result you rolled. When doing so, if the bearer’s unit is below its Starting Strength, you can re-roll up to 3 Miracle dice in this way instead.
**CANONESS** or **PALATINE** model only. Each time an attack is allocated to the bearer, change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 1.

**ADEPTA SORORITAS** model only. While the bearer is on the battlefield, each time an enemy unit is destroyed by a **PENITENT** unit from your army, you can discard 1 Miracle dice then gain 1 Miracle dice showing a value of 6.

**PENITENT** model only. Once per battle, at the start of the battle round, select one Vow of Atonement (see the Desperate for Redemption detachment rule). Until the start of the next battle round, that Vow of Atonement is active for the bearer’s unit in addition to any that is active for your army, even if you have already selected that Vow of Atonement this battle.
**PENITENT** model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.
**CANONESS**, **PALATINE** or **MINISTORUM PRIEST** model only. The bearer gains the **PENITENT** keyword.

**ADEPTA SORORITAS** model only. Each time the bearer is selected to fight, you can first discard up to 3 Miracle dice. For each Miracle dice just discarded, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons.

**ADEPTA SORORITAS** model only. At the start of your Command phase, you can discard up to 2 Miracle dice. Then, add 1 Miracle dice to your Miracle Dice pool showing a value equal to the sum of the two Miracle dice you just discarded (to a maximum of 6).

**ADEPTA SORORITAS** model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of Torrent weapons equipped by models in that unit, and all other ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability.
**CANONESS** or **PALATINE** model only. The bearer has a Save characteristic of 2+ and the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

**CANONESS** or **PALATINE** model only. At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, take a Leadership test for the bearer. If that test is passed, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

**ADEPTA SORORITAS** model only. Improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons by 1, and those weapons have the **[PRECISION]** ability. In addition, each time the bearer fights, if one or more enemy models are destroyed by those attacks, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

**ADEPTA SORORITAS** model only. In your Movement phase, you can select one enemy unit within 12" of the bearer; that unit must take a Battle-shock test. If that test is failed, you gain 1 Miracle dice.
**ADEPTA SORORITAS** model only. Each time the bearer uses an Act of Faith to substitute a saving throw, that saving throw is successful, irrespective of the value of the Miracle dice used.

**ADEPTA SORORITAS** model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack’s Ballistic Skill or Weapon Skill characteristics and/or any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

**ADEPTA SORORITAS** model only. Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons. While the bearer’s unit is Righteous, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic and add 1 to the Damage characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons instead.
**ADEPTA SORORITAS** model only. The bearer’s weapons have the **[PRECISION]** ability. Each time the bearer’s unit destroys an enemy **CHARACTER** model, you gain 1CP.
**ADEPTA SORORITAS** model only. Enemy units that are set up on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up within 12" of the bearer.
While this unit is leading a unit and contains an Aestred Thurga model, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **[DEVASTATING WOUNDS]** ability.

name.en: Recount the Deeds of the Saints

description.en: While this unit is leading a unit and contains an Agathe Dolan model, each time that unit destroys an enemy unit, you gain 1 Miracle dice. When that Agathae Dolan model is destroyed, you gain D3 Miracle dice.

loadout.en:
**Aestred Thurga is equipped with:** bolt pistol; Blade of Vigil.
**Agathae Dolan is equipped with:** bolt pistol; scribe’s staff.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: Aestred Thurga is a powerful warrior in her own right, but recognises with great humility that the ancient relic standard she carries is far more important than she can ever be. She will gladly die to protect the Auto-Tapestry of the Emperor’s Judgement, while the Sisters she fights alongside are inspired to carry out great deeds of faith in its presence – feats recorded by the Hagiolater, Agathae Dolan.

fluff.en: Arco-flagellants are fitted with cybernetic weaponry and subdermal stimulant pumps as punishment for past misdeeds. When battle commences, trigger words energise their bodies and the Arco-flagellants launch on the enemy. They lash any foe they reach to pieces with cyber-implanted flails.

description.en:
Once per battle, after this unit has performed an Act of Faith, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

***Designer’s Note:** Place a Cherub token next to the unit, removing it once this ability has been used.*

At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

At the end of your Command phase, for each objective marker you control that has one or more units from your army with this ability within range of it, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1 Miracle dice showing a value equal to that result.

Flanked by her chosen Geminae champions, her gestures can heal the sick or strike like the Emperor’s judgement to smite the foe with divine strength.

description.en: While this unit contains a **MINISTORUM PRIEST**, melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability.

Once per battle, after this unit has performed an Act of Faith, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

***Designer’s Note:** Place a Cherub token next to the unit, removing it once this ability has been used.*

At the end of your Command phase, for each objective marker you control that has one or more units from your army with this ability within range of it, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1 Miracle dice showing a value equal to that result.
In your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you can return up to D3 destroyed models (excluding **CHARACTER** models) to this unit.

If a **MINISTORUM PRIEST** from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a **BATTLE SISTERS SQUAD**, it can be attached to this unit instead. If a **MINISTORUM PRIEST** from your army is attached to this unit during the Declare Battle Formations step, that model gains the Scouts 6" ability.

wargear.en: For every 5 models in the unit, up to 2 Seraphim can each have their 2 bolt pistols replaced with one of the following:  ◦ 2 inferno pistols ◦ 2 Ministorum hand flamers

The Seraphim Superior’s 2 bolt pistols can be replaced with one of the following: ◦ 1 bolt pistol and 1 chainsword ◦ 1 bolt pistol and 1 plasma pistol ◦ 1 bolt pistol and 1 power weapon ◦ 1 plasma pistol and 1 chainsword ◦ 1 plasma pistol and 1 power weapon

fluff.en: The Seraphim fight in the Adepta Sororitas advanced guard. Only Battle Sisters with superlative reflexes are selected to join their ranks, firing with pinpoint accuracy while moving at immense speeds. They must be able to land with incredible precision, cut down foes and retreat within a few heartbeats.

description.en: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If the target of that attack is an enemy unit within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.
You can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.

fluff.en: Rhinos are the mainstay transport of the Adepta Sororitas, with Engineers and Ministorum Priests blessing each before battles. They are durable, robust and easy to operate, and thanks to their indomitable machine spirits, they rarely break down. They speed the warriors inside them across the battlefield wherever they are needed.

transport.en: This model has a transport capacity of 12 **ADEPTA SORORITAS INFANTRY** models. It cannot transport **JUMP PACK** models or the **TRIUMPH OF SAINT KATHERINE.**

description.en: At the start of the battle round, select up to two of the abilities in the Relics of the Matriarchs section. Until the start of the next battle round, this model has those abilities.
Each time you gain 1 Miracle dice at the start of the battle round, if this model is on the battlefield, do not roll one D6 to determine the value of that Miracle dice; it has a value of 6.
While a friendly **ADEPTA SORORITAS** unit is within 6" of this model, add 2" to that unit’s Move characteristic and add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit.
While a friendly **ADEPTA SORORITAS** unit is within 6" of this model, you can re-roll Battle-shock tests taken for that unit.
While a friendly **ADEPTA SORORITAS** unit is within 6" of this model, that unit can perform up to two Acts of Faith per phase, instead of only one.
While a friendly **ADEPTA SORORITAS** unit is within 6" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.
While a friendly **ADEPTA SORORITAS** unit is within 6" of this model, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability.
While a friendly **ADEPTA SORORITAS** unit is within 6" of this model, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in that unit by 1.

While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, the Attacks characteristics of all of its weapons are halved, and you can only select one ability when using its Relics of the Matriarchs ability, instead of up to two.

composition.en: **1 Triumph of Saint Katherine – EPIC HERO**

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** bolt pistols; relic weapons.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: At the centre of the Triumph is the blessed bier upon which lie the mortal remains of Saint Katherine beneath the sconce containing her fiery heart. Wherever the Triumph goes, the Emperor’s radiance goes with it. The glory of the martyred Matriarch spreads, and Battle Sisters fill with conviction to purge the foes of Mankind.
